test.name: Dropdown operation

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (747, 665). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff2a865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff2a8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afa8596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae8225] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae5e43] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae3197] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae2060] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad4a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afb08e6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad42d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afb2dcf4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad2b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad3a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b050d3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b0507a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b052bca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff472ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff4fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff34404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff34594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff175c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]
kw.status:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (747, 665). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff2a865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff2a8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afa8596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae8225] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae5e43] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae3197] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae2060] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad4a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afb08e6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad42d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afb2dcf4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad2b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad3a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b050d3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b0507a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b052bca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff472ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff4fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff34404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff34594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff175c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select Radio Button
kw.doc: Sets the radio button group ``group_name`` to ``value``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.status:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (747, 665). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff2a865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff2a8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afa8596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae8225] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae5e43] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae3197] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afae2060] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad4a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afb08e6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad42d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afb2dcf4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad2b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7afad3a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b050d3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b0507a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b052bca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff472ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff4fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff34404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff34594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7aff175c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]
